old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-yoz4","title":"Add comprehensive telemetry for cross-impl debugging","description":"The heterogeneous mesh testing (ec2-hetero-fleet.sh) needs proper telemetry to debug interop failures. Currently logging is sparse and inconsistent across implementations.

Requirements:
1. Every TX/RX logged with: timestamp, packet hex, length, RSSI/SNR (RX only)
2. Structured JSON metrics per node: tx_count, rx_count, unique_peers, errors
3. Pcap capture for wire-level Wireshark analysis
4. Cross-impl packet tracking: hash each packet so we can verify 'Python sent X, Rust received X'

This epic covers all three implementations: Python, Rust, Zephyr C.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-13T03:57:01.182492Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-13T03:57:01.18253Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-yoz4","title":"Add comprehensive telemetry for cross-impl debugging","description":"The heterogeneous mesh testing (ec2-hetero-fleet.sh) needs proper telemetry to debug interop failures. Currently logging is sparse and inconsistent across implementations.

Requirements:
1. Every TX/RX logged with: timestamp, packet hex, length, RSSI/SNR (RX only)
2. Structured JSON metrics per node: tx_count, rx_count, unique_peers, errors
3. Pcap capture for wire-level Wireshark analysis
4. Cross-impl packet tracking: hash each packet so we can verify 'Python sent X, Rust received X'

This epic covers all three implementations: Python, Rust, Zephyr C.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-13T03:57:01.182492Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:52.819982952Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:52.819982952Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:52.819982952Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:08:52.819982952Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: e2433ece9 - Added comprehensive packet logging hooks and JSON metrics in Python sim (sim_client.py, simulation.py updates). Fixed type union compat for loadng/messages.py and range checks in rpl/messages.py to support telemetry packet hashing. Tests now pass. Rust/C telemetry stubs filed as child beads. Partial progress toward full cross-impl telemetry for hetero fleet debugging."}
Partial telemetry hooks and Python compat fixes committed. Child beads created for Rust and C impls. Tests pass, lint clean. Hash recorded.
